description_long: This is a compact event kiosk designed for promotional or entertainment purposes, prominently featuring Red Bull branding on a large, curved sign above the main structure. The kiosk has a raised platform stage with a deep blue floor, flanked by two large gray speakers and a central DJ booth or counter. The backdrop is a beige panel with a printed sky and clouds motif, adding a playful and inviting atmosphere. Overhead, a truss structure supports lighting fixtures aimed at the stage area, enhancing visibility and ambiance. The kiosk is open at the front, allowing easy access for performers or staff, while the back and sides are enclosed for structural support and branding. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban events, festivals, or street activations.
description: A modern, Red Bull-branded event kiosk with a stage, speakers, and overhead lighting, featuring a sky-themed backdrop and a prominent curved sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stage, DJ booth, two large speakers, sky-themed backdrop, and the Red Bull sign above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stage, the thickness of the backdrop, and the protruding speakers and lighting truss.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain beige back panel and the supporting truss structure, with no visible signage or interactive elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the stage depth, speaker placement, and lighting truss from the other side.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and logo signage; large curved Red Bull logo sign above the stage, integrated into the structure.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a prominent curved sign and truss-supported lighting fixtures; no overhangs or skylights.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern promotional/event style with functional and branded elements.
